title: alstonia macrophylla var. acuminata
intro: Alstonia macrophylla var. acuminata, also known as the "Queen of the Night," is a variant of the Alstonia macrophylla plant, a species of flowering plant in the Apocynaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antipyretic properties, making it a popular treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of Alstonia macrophylla var. acuminata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory infections, among others. The plant is commonly prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
